title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SFP10-1290 - CWDM optical module, SM, 10 Gbps, SFP+, 1290 nm, 2x LC
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: 10G singlemode optical CWDM module with a wavelength of 1290nm . The module is compatible with both SFP+ and SFP interfaces and is suitable for links up to 20 km. It features 2 LC connectors with UPC polish Wavelength: 1290nm Data rate up to 10 Gb/s Compatible with SFP+ and SFP Reach up to 20 km
